volumeInfo.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
volumeInfo.description: Harry Potter has never even heard of Hogwarts when the letters start dropping on the doormat at number four, Privet Drive. Addressed in green ink on yellowish parchment with a purple seal, they are swiftly confiscated by his grisly aunt and uncle. Then, on Harry's eleventh birthday, a great beetle-eyed giant of a man called Rubeus Hagrid bursts in with some astonishing news: Harry Potter is a wizard, and he has a place at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

volumeInfo.title: The Great Gatsby
volumeInfo.description: The story of the mysteriously wealthy Jay Gatsby and his love for the beautiful Daisy Buchanan, of lavish parties on Long Island at a time when The New York Times noted gin was the national drink and sex the national obsession.

volumeInfo.title: Clean Code
volumeInfo.description: Even bad code can function. But if code isn't clean, it can bring a development organization to its knees. Every year, countless hours and significant resources are lost because of poorly written code. But it doesn't have to be that way.

volumeInfo.title: The Hobbit
volumeInfo.description: Bilbo Baggins is a hobbit who enjoys a comfortable, unambitious life, rarely traveling any farther than his pantry or cellar. But his contentment is disturbed when the wizard Gandalf and a company of dwarves arrive on his doorstep one day to whisk him away on an adventure.

volumeInfo.title: Eloquent JavaScript
volumeInfo.description: JavaScript lies at the heart of almost every modern web application. This book is a dive into the language itself, showing you how to write beautiful, effective code.

volumeInfo.title: Pride and Prejudice
volumeInfo.description: It is a truth universally acknowledged, that a single man in possession of a good fortune, must be in want of a wife. So begins one of the most beloved novels in English literature, following the spirited Elizabeth Bennet.

volumeInfo.title: A Mysterious Manuscript
volumeInfo.description: An obscure text with very little information available. This entry deliberately has no cover image so you can test your placeholder fallback.
